query: SELECT DISTINCT li.description, li.unitPrice FROM invoiceLineItems li WHERE li.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 AND UPPER(li.description) IN ('CHOCOLAT DE COUVERTURE NOIR 64% PURETÉ EXTRA-BITTER GUAYAQUIL - CACAO BARRY 20 KG', 'NUTS PISTACHIO SHELLED UNS(12', 'NUTELLA 2 X 3 KG', 'DOUGH PUFF PASTRY SHEET 10X15IN V/F', 'SAUCE SRIRACHA F/GLU KIKKO (6', 'SOFT DRINK COKE CAN', 'NOIX DE GRENOBLE EN PETIT MORCEAUX 30 LB', 'LALTISAN FRESH - CONDITIONNEUR POUR PAINS FRAIS 10 KG', 'PÉPITES DE CHOCOLAT PUR FONCÉ 4000CT - FOLEY''S 12 KG') LIMIT 15;
